package.name: aithericon_motion_bridge
package.description: Path C motion-bridge for the dev xArm 6 (fake) image. Re-exposes MoveIt move_group planning as a flat /plan_to_pose service that RETURNS the planned trajectory (the stock xarm_pose_plan stashes the plan internally and returns only {success}). A plain rclpy node calls move_group's own services (/compute_ik GetPositionIK, then /plan_kinematic_path GetMotionPlan with hand-built JointConstraints from the IK solution), since moveit_py is not available in the image. The response carries the INNER trajectory_msgs/JointTrajectory serialized to JSON so it can be spliced verbatim into Path B's FollowJointTrajectory goal, plus a typed metrics sidecar the demo's Decision gate keys off.
